calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Court Judgment Against Defendant Anh Mai And Summary Of The Case
Off Calendar Dec-06-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Anh Mai.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Edward A. Holtz, Esq. appeared wit plaintiff Hue Thanh Tran, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Anh Mai.
Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract & fraud was filed on November 26, 2014, with substitute service effecuated on defendant Anh Mai on July 26, 2015.
Default was entered against defendant Anh Mai on August 15, 2016.
Dismissals as to defendants Veronica Cortez, Tami Taylor & Lynn Lopez were entered on February 1, 2016.
Dismissal as to defendant Ameriwest Funding, Inc. was entered on August 15, 2016.
Dismissal as to defendant Agueda Maria Marichal was enterd on March 30, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, December 6, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hue Thanh Tran, and against the Defaulted Defendant Anh Mai, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,499.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $12,845.00.
Costs - $615.00.

Total - $40,959.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
